posts.author: ReturnOfTheMac (M-A C)
posts.cookedHtml:
See image below for reference.
I have my main table and I have two other table views.
The last one is called “To Do” and albeit being so shortnamed, Monday doesn’t display it completely.
I don’t have anything else afterwards, can we have those tabs dynamically scale so we see the names for as long as we don’t fill up the screen please?

image910×57 1.79 KB

That’s a 10 minutes fix…

Thank you!
MAC
